name: project-init
description: Cowork project lifecycle for MoxyWolf projects. /init-project scaffolds tailored Project Instructions. /session-start mounts the three standard roots and reads the previous session's handoff (including the new `author` / `for` baton-pass fields). /session-end asks who authored this handoff and whether it's a baton-pass to a teammate, then writes the canonical-named handoff with `author` and optional `for` frontmatter auto-populated. Supports --author, --handoff-to, and --solo flags. Refreshes each writable GitHub repo's README.md against a canonical 16-section structure, then runs /obsidian-update to capture durable knowledge into the MoxyWolf vault.
